_documentation: Each entry is one update shown on /changelog/ and in the 'Latest updates' strip on Home. Fields: date (YYYY-MM-DD), title, description, tags (array, e.g. project names or categories like 'Nexo Rank', 'New project'). Add new entries as you actually ship things, newest first (they're re-sorted by date automatically either way).

entries.title: Live status checks, changelog, and project pages
entries.description: Live projects now show a real-time reachability check instead of a static label. Added this changelog, plus a dedicated page for every project with its own URL and SEO metadata.

entries.title: Self-hosted every icon on the site
entries.description: Replaced CDN-loaded icons with a self-hosted icon sprite and inlined brand logos, so nothing can be blocked by an ad-blocker or fail to load from a third-party service.

entries.title: Connected socials: Discord, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Twitch, LinkedIn
entries.description: The Socials page and footer now link out to every place to follow Nexo Realm.

entries.title: Added Nexo Hub, Nexo Boost, Nexo List, and Nexosites to the realm
entries.description: The first four projects went live on the Projects and Showcase pages.

entries.title: Nexo Realm launched
entries.description: The central hub connecting every current and future Nexo project, tool, and social profile went live.
